features.name: if-else if-else chain implicit genblk naming
features.description: Code should include an if-else if-else chain where each branch creates an implicit unnamed generate block, and all blocks in the same scope should receive the same implicit name 'genblk1'

features.name: nested genblk numbering should reset in inner scope
features.description: Code should include nested if statements within begin...end blocks where genblk numbering should reset to 1 in each new scope, but the bug causes numbering to continue from outer scope
